methods.description: This method involves preparing recycled concrete with vitrified micro bubbles and measuring its workability and apparent density. The analysis focuses on how the dosage of granular particles affects the density of the concrete.

steps.description: Prepare recycled concrete with varying amounts of vitrified micro bubbles.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare concrete mixtures with different vitrified micro bubble dosages

steps.description: Measure the apparent density of the prepared concrete samples.
steps.searchable_summary: measure apparent density of concrete samples

steps.description: Analyze the trend of density decrease with the increase of granular particle dosage.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze density trends based on granular particle dosage

steps.description: Compare the apparent density of concrete with 100% and 120% mixing amounts of vitrified micro bubbles.
steps.searchable_summary: compare density for 100% vs 120% vitrified micro bubble mixing
inputs: apparent density values for 100% and 120% mixing
